summary: Complete backend testing of residual guide auto-import feature. All 58 tests pass (32 unit tests + 20 km_adjustments tests + 6 new residual guide upload tests). The upload-residual-guide endpoint correctly auto-detects month/year from PDF content, extracts km adjustments from last page, compares with existing data, and saves files with French month names.
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/upload-residual-guide correctly auto-detects month/year from PDF content (searches for 'MARCH 2026' etc on first 3 pages)
KM adjustments are correctly extracted from the last page of the residual guide (line-by-line parsing of '18,000 Kilometers per year' followed by values)
Response includes detected_period, detected_month, detected_year fields
Response includes changes object with new_vehicles, modified_vehicles, unchanged_vehicles counts
Response includes km_adjustments with source='residual_guide' and correct values (12k_60mo=5, 18k_60mo=4)
File is saved as sci_residuals_mars2026.json (with French month name)
GET /api/sci/residuals?month=3&year=2026 returns the new residual data with correct km_adjustments
Ram 1500 Laramie Crew Cab LWB 4WD shows 60mo base residual of 46% (verified)

success_rate.backend: 100% (58/58 tests passed - 32 unit + 20 km_adjustments + 6 residual guide upload)

seed_data_creation: Using existing test PDF (april_2026_residual.pdf which contains MARCH 2026 data)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Residual guide auto-import feature fully tested. Backend correctly auto-detects month/year, extracts km adjustments, compares with existing data, and saves with French month names. All 58 backend tests pass.

feature_1_auto_detect_month_year.description: POST /api/upload-residual-guide with ONLY file and password auto-detects 'Mars 2026' from PDF content

feature_2_detected_period_field.description: Response includes 'detected_period' field showing the detected month

feature_3_changes_object.description: Response includes 'changes' object with new_vehicles, modified_vehicles, unchanged_vehicles counts

feature_4_km_adjustments_source.description: KM adjustments extracted from last page with source='residual_guide'

feature_6_french_filename.description: File saved as sci_residuals_mars2026.json (with French month name)

feature_7_get_residuals_api.description: GET /api/sci/residuals?month=3&year=2026 returns new residual data with correct km_adjustments

feature_8_ram_1500_residual.description: Ram 1500 Laramie Crew Cab LWB 4WD shows 60mo base residual of 46%
